description: Design a 3D-printable plastic enclosure base for a PCB in SolveSpace. The enclosure must have external dimensions of 100mm wide by 60mm deep and a total height of 30mm. The interior should be hollowed out to leave a uniform 2mm wall thickness and a 2mm thick floor. Inside the cavity, include four cylindrical mounting standoffs, each 8mm in diameter and 10mm high, positioned at coordinates (±42, ±22) relative to the center. Each standoff must feature a concentric 3mm diameter blind pilot hole that is 10mm deep. Save the final 3D model to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/pcb_enclosure.slvs.
